name: Crystal Garden
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine salt, bluing, water, and ammonia in a shallow glass or china bowl.
2. Pour over small pieces of rock or coal.
3. Drip food coloring on top, if desired.
4. Crystals will begin to grow soon. Add water occasionally to encourage further growth.
5. Place the dish on a tray or wooden board as crystals may grow over the sides of the bowl.
